reorderBtn: Taabo si aad dib u dalabto →
allStockHealthy: Dhammaan heerarka kaydku waa caafimaad qabaan
clickMetricHint: Guji cabbir kasta si aad falanqayn qoto dheer u hesho
concentrationHigh: Qaybtaada ugu sarreysa waxay ka dhigan tahay {pct}% dakhliga. Fiiri inaad kala duwato si aad u yaraysid ku-tiirsanaanta.
concentrationModerate: Qaybta ugu sarreysa waa {pct}% dakhliga. Waxaa jira meel lagu horumariyo kala-duwanaanta isku-dhafka.
concentrationLow: Kala-duwanaan wanaagsan — qaybta ugu sarreysa waa kaliya {pct}% dakhliga.
noCategoryData: Weli xog qaybeed lama heli karo. Ku calaamadee badeecooyinkaaga qaybo si aad u aragto kala-jajabinta isku-dhafka.
kpiDailyAvgTip1: Celceliskaaga maalinlaha wuxuu tixgeliyaa maalmaha gaabis iyo kuwa mashquulka badan
kpiDailyAvgTip2: Tan u isticmaal saldhig lagu cabbiro saameynta xayaysiinta
kpiDailyAvgTip3: Tan toddobaadle ah raadraac — celcelis kor u kacaya wuxuu tilmaamayaa koritaan caafimaad qaba
kpiDailyAvgTip4: Haddii uu siman yahay ama hoos u dhacayo, hubi tirada dadka soo galaya iyo gaadhida suuqgeynta
kpiDailyAvgTipNo1: Bilow diiwaangelinta iibka si aad u dhisto saldhig
kpiDailyAvgTipNo2: Raadraac maalinle joogto ah wuxuu furaa falanqaynta isbeddelka
kpiDailyAvgActionYes: Dhig bartilmaameed maalinle 10% ka sarreeya celceliskaaga hadda oo raadraac horumarka
kpiDailyAvgActionNo: Diiwaangeli ugu yaraan 7 maalmood oo xog iib ah si aad u dhisto celcelis macno leh
kpiDailyAvgAskPrompt: Ii falanqee celceliska iibkayga maalinlaha ah — ma kor buu u socdaa mise hoos? Maalmaha maxay hoos u jiidayaan celceliska oo maxaan ka qaban karaa?
kpiTodayVsAvgBenchmarkAbove: Celceliska ka sarreeya — maalin fiican ilaa hadda
kpiTodayVsAvgTipAbove1: Maanta waxay ka fiican tahay celceliskaaga toddobaadle
kpiTodayVsAvgTipAbove2: Hubi waxa kiciyay kororka — xayaysiin, maalinta toddobaadka, cimilo?
kpiTodayVsAvgTipAbove3: Ku celi xaaladaha guulaysta maalmaha gaabiska ah
kpiTodayVsAvgTipBelow2: Hubi: Ma weli waa maalin hore? Xawaaruhu wuu kordhi karaa
kpiTodayVsAvgTipBelow3: Fiiri xayaysiin degdeg ah ama riixitaan baraha bulshada si aad u kordhiso tirada dadka
kpiTodayVsAvgTipBelow4: La barbardhig isla maalintii toddobaadkii hore si aad macluumaad u hesho
kpiTodayVsAvgActionAbove: Diiwaangeli waxa maanta guuleystay si aad ku celin karto
kpiTodayVsAvgActionBelow: Fiiri dalab wakhti xaddidan si aad u kordhiso iibka ka hor dhamaadka maalinta
kpiGrossMarginBenchmarkExcellent: Aad u fiican — heerka faa'iido ugu sarreeya
kpiGrossMarginBenchmarkHealthy: Heerar faa'iido caafimaad qaba oo qaybaha badankood ku habboon
kpiGrossMarginBenchmarkBelow: Celceliska ka hooseeya — dib u eeg qiimaha iyo kharashaadka
kpiGrossMarginBenchmarkCritical: Halis — heerarka faa'iidadu aad bay u yar yihiin oo lama sii wadi karo
kpiGrossMarginTipGood1: Heerarka faa'iidadu waa caafimaad qabaan — ilaali awoodda qiimeynta
kpiGrossMarginTipGood2: Raadi fursado iib sare oo tayo leh si aad heerka faa'iidada ballaadhinta
kpiGrossMarginTipGood3: Kormeer qiimaha alaab-qeybiyeyaasha si aad u ogaato kororyada gurguurta
kpiGrossMarginTipGood4: Fiiri in koritaanka tirada uu carqaladayn karo heerarka faa'iidada
kpiGrossMarginTipWarn1: Heerarka faa'iidadu waa cidhiidhi — dib u eeg alaabtaada kharashka ugu sarreeya
kpiGrossMarginTipWarn2: La xaajood qiimeyaal wanaagsan alaab-qeybiyeyaashaada 3-da ugu sarreeya
kpiGrossMarginTipWarn3: Fiiri inaad isku darto alaab faa'iido yar iyo kuwo faa'iido sare leh
kpiGrossMarginTipWarn4: Hubi haddii badeeco ay ka hooseyso qiimaha alaabta
kpiGrossMarginTipCrit1: Heerarka faa'iidadu si xun ayey u hooseeyaan — waxaa loo baahan yahay tallaabo degdeg ah
kpiGrossMarginTipCrit3: Fiiri inaad joojiso alaabta faa'iidadu ka hooseyso
kpiGrossMarginTipCrit4: Kor u qaad qiimayaasha meesha suuqu qaadi karo — xitaa 5% way caawinaysaa
kpiGrossMarginActionGood: Diiradda saar ilaalinta heerarka faa'iidada iyadoo tirada la kordhinayo — ka fogow qiimo-dhimis aan lama huraan ahayn
kpiGrossMarginActionBad: Si degdeg ah dib u eeg qiimeyntaada iyo qaab-dhismeedka kharashka toddobaadkan
kpiAvgBasketTip1: Cabbirka celceliska dambiisha wuxuu tilmaamayaa waxa macmiilku ku kharash gareeyo booqasho kasta
kpiAvgBasketTip2: Iib sare iyo iib-isku-xir wuxuu kordhin karaa qiimaha dambiisha 15-30%
kpiAvgBasketTip3: Dalabyada isku-dhafan iyo heshiisyada combo waa dhisayaal dambiis oo la caddeeyay
kpiAvgBasketTip4: Tababarka shaqaalaha ee iibinta talo-siinta ah wuxuu leeyahay ROI ugu sarreeya
kpiAvgBasketTip5: Raadraac cabbirka dambiisha wakhti walba — dambiisha qadada vs cashada badanaa aad bay u kala duwan yihiin
kpiAvgBasketTipNo: Bilow raadraaca si aad u aragto qiimaha celceliska macaamilkaaga
kpiAvgBasketActionYes: Soo bandhig soo jeedin "badanaa la iska wada iibsado" ama samee heshiis combo si aad u kordhiso cabbirka dambiisha
kpiAvgBasketActionNo: Diiwaangeli iibka si aad u bilowdo raadraaca cabbirrada dambiisha
kpiNetSalesBenchmarkClean: Soo-celin ma jirto maanta — iib nadiif ah
kpiNetSalesTip1: Iibka saafiga ah = dakhliga guud oo laga jaray soo-celin iyo qiimo-dhimis
kpiNetSalesTipNoRefunds: Soo-celin ma jirto maanta — hubinta tayo aad u wanaagsan
kpiNetSalesTipDiscounts: Qiimo-dhimis: {value} — hubi in kuwaani ay kordhinayaan tirada
kpiNetSalesTip4: Heerar soo-celin sare badanaa waxay tilmaamayaan dhibaatooyinka tayada badeecada ama filashooyin aan is waafaqsanayn
kpiNetSalesTip5: Raadraac saamiga qiimo-dhimis-ilaa-dakhli — in ka badan 10% waxay tilmaami kartaa dhibaatooyin qiimeyn
kpiNetSalesActionRefunds: Baar sababta asaasiga ah ee soo-celinta — ma waa tayada badeecada, alaab qaldan, ama qoomamaynta iibsadaha?
kpiNetSalesActionClean: Ku hay heerarka soo-celinta hoos iyadoo la ilaalinayo tayada iyo sharraxaadaha badeecada oo cad
kpiPeakHourBenchmarkNo: Weli saacadda ugu mashquulka badan lama garan
kpiPeakHourTip1: Saacaddaada ganacsi ugu mashquulka badan — hubi shaqaale buuxa daaqaddan
kpiPeakHourTip2: Hore u diyaari kayd iyo alaab ka hor saacadda ugu mashquulka badan si aad u fogaato caqabadaha
kpiPeakHourTip3: Fiiri qiimeyn sare ama dalabyo wakhti-xaddidan intii lagu jiray saacadda ugu mashquulka badan
kpiPeakHourTip4: Raadraac isbeddellada saacadda ugu mashquulka badan maalinta toddobaadka — saacadaha maalinta shaqada vs sabtida way kala duwan yihiin
kpiPeakHourTip5: Saacadaha aan mashquulka badnayn waa fursado xayaysiin lagu simo baahida
kpiPeakHourTipNo: Diiwaangeli xog iib dheeraad ah si aad u garato saacaddaada ganacsi ugu mashquulka badan
kpiPeakHourActionYes: Hubi inaad haysato shaqaale ugu badan intii lagu jiray saacadda ugu mashquulka badan oo hore u diyaari alaabtaada ugu caansan
kpiPeakHourActionNo: Raadraac iibka saacadlaha ugu yaraan toddobaad si aad u garato qaababka
chartThisWeekVsPrev: Toddobaadkan Maalinle — vs Celceliska Toddobaadkii Hore
askPromptTime: Ii falanqee qaababka wakhtiga iibkayga — saacadaha iyo maalmaha kee ayaa ugu wanaagsan? Halkee ayaan diiradda ku saaraa shaqaalaynta?
askPromptCategories: Ii falanqee isku-dhafka qaybaha badeecadayda — ma qayb keliya baan aad ugu tiirsanahay? Maxaan xayaysiiyaa ama u kala duwadaa?
askPromptPayments: Ii falanqee hababka lacag-bixintayda iyo waxqabadka shaqaalaha — yaa ah kuwa ugu waxqabadka fiican oo sidee baan u wanaajin karaa kooxda?
askPromptDefault: Ii falanqee xogta iibka POS si faahfaahsan
